推荐场景: 朋友低落时聊天｜回应情绪
60秒任务: 「安慰和支持」：拒绝/边界/误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 委婉表达｜误会修复｜情绪支持｜边界｜关系维护｜隐含意图
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I’m really sorry you’re going through this.（表达同情）
That sounds incredibly stressful.（回应压力）
You don’t have to handle it alone.（提供支持）
I’m here if you want to talk.（陪伴）
Do you want advice, or just someone to listen?（确认需求）
It makes sense that you feel that way.（认可情绪）
You did the best you could.（安慰）
This isn’t your fault.（减轻自责）
Let’s take it one step at a time.（降低压力）
What would help most right now?（询问帮助方式）
I can stay with you for a bit.（具体支持）
You’re not overreacting.（确认感受合理）
Give yourself some time.（给时间）
We’ll figure this out together.（共同解决）
I’m on your side.（表明立场）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: stress, support, advice, feeling, problem, family, friend, mistake, pressure
Verbs: listen, help, handle, feel, stay, breathe, figure out, support
Adjectives / Tone: stressful, unfair, heavy, hurt, overwhelmed, calm, safe
Time / Place: right now, tonight, at home, after dinner, in private
Chunks: one step at a time, on your side, not your fault, want to talk, give yourself time
